name: ai-workspace-orchestrator
description: Project and workspace AI setup orchestrator. Builds AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md contracts, optional global or project skills, Spotify Squad-style agent/subagent topology, and adversarial setup review for single apps, monorepos, and multi-domain workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Configure AI agents, skills, and workspace contracts.
interface.longDescription: Guided setup for project or domain AI operating systems. It asks the minimum necessary questions, discovers repo topology, creates AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md contracts, plans or installs global/project skills, designs Spotify Squad-style orchestrators, and reviews durable setup changes adversarially before merge.
defaultPrompt: Set up AI config for this workspace.
